name: Dr. Faizan Sheikh
qualifications: BDS, Dip. Crown & Bridge, C. Orthodontics, C. Implantology
shortBio: Multi-disciplinary specialist combining diplomas in Crown & Bridge, Orthodontics, and Implantology — delivering a complete range of dental care under one roof.
fullBio: Dr. Faizan Sheikh is the lead dentist at The Perfect Smile. After completing his BDS, he served as a house surgeon at Sharif Hospital, Lahore — gaining hands-on hospital-grade clinical experience before going on to formal training in three major dental disciplines: crown & bridge prosthodontics, orthodontics, and implantology. That breadth means complex cases that often require referrals to multiple separate specialists can be managed end-to-end here, with strict clinical standards and the warmth of a family clinic.
